name: Grenade Belt

granted_abilities.name: Bandolier
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, another ally within 4" may gain an Impact token.

granted_actions.name: Clockwork Grenade
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may suffer -1 to its duel total to ignore LoS.
granted_actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemy models within 0"2" of the marker must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the made marker.

triggers.name: Unexploded Round
triggers.text: When resolving, do not remove the made marker.

triggers.name: Extra Explosives
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (!) generated by this action by +1".

triggers.name: "I'm Out!"
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared if able. Discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The (!) symbol in the Extra Explosives trigger represents an aura/pulse distance, referring to the 0"2" range mentioned in the action effects.
